## Testing

How were these changes tested?

- [ ] `dotnet build` passes with 0 warnings
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes
- [ ] Analyzer/style checks pass, if changed code affects analyzer-covered areas
- [ ] Tested on hardware (if applicable)
- [ ] Docs/config/support matrices updated when behavior or public API changed
- [ ] No local deploy props, credentials, pairing codes, Wi-Fi passwords, API keys, or machine-specific settings committed
